text: Archive: now available on right-click for Directs/Channels.
Disconnect/Reconnect: new options to Delete all messages and Revoke/Restore access to all shared content.
Actions dropdown: available on right-click in Directs/Channels lists.
Reactions: indicator is shown in Directs/Channels lists when Reactions are applied.
Push notification: sent to Inviter when a new Contact autoconnects.
